changelog:
* **fix: resolve release build symbols** (574f07f)
  - Replace com.google.android.material.R.attr.colorPrimary with android.R.attr.colorPrimary
  - Pass secondaryTextColor into downloadApk parameter scope
* **feat: improve OTA download dialog UI** (fde6036)
  - Add version transition banner and real-time metrics (speed, size, ETA)
  - Implement dynamic status message stage transitions and APK package verification
  - Add safe download cancellation support and Material Design polish
* **fix: verify OTA update installation** (4919e65)
  - Store target version and version code as pending update before installing
  - Compare current installed app version with pending update version on launch
  - Only show success toast and clear pending state when app versions match
